title: Valentine's Night
content:
You shadow and flame,
    You interchange,
    You death in the game!

    Now I gather you up,
    Now I put you back
    Like a poppy in its cup.

    And so, you are a maid
    Again, my darling, but new,
    Unafraid.

    My love, my blossom, a child
    Almost! The flower in the bud
    Again, undefiled.

    And yet, a woman, knowing
    All, good, evil, both
    In one blossom blowing.
meaning:
D. H. Lawrence (David Herbert Richards)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Valentine's Night"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
